flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Tabor College fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 (75.4% → 52.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tabor College fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 (48.0% → 33.7%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Tabor College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (42.0% → 33.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tabor College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (555 → 494).
